webVerification.sourceLabel: Rochester Social Security Office locator listing
webVerification.notes: Multi-source web confirms 866-964-2045 as the Rochester SSA office direct line at 200 E Main St, 2nd Fl, 14604. M-F 9am-4pm. Effective Jan 6 2025, all in-office service requires an appointment (including SSN card requests). National toll-free 800-772-1213 for general SSA questions.
